text_block_list.text:
I've been so absorbed in my work that I lose track
of time. As I rush back home, I run into someone
familiar...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? What are you still doing here, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Don't tell me you've been out here training this
whole time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I just can't stop thinking about the race... I
thought running would take my mind off of it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But... no such luck. I'm not sure what else to try...

She seems exhausted from her race... It might be
time to adjust her schedule so she can take a
break.
